text: Healthy living means taking care of both your body and your mind. A balanced diet rich in fruits, vegetables, and whole grains gives you energy and keeps your body strong. Regular exercise, like walking, swimming, or cycling, helps maintain a healthy weight and reduces the risk of illness. Getting enough sleep, around seven to nine hours each night, is also essential for recovery and concentration. Equally important is mental health, which means managing stress and staying positive. Achieving a good work-life balance helps you relax and spend time with loved ones. By combining these habits, you can create a healthy and happy lifestyle.
